verse.name: v1
verse.lines: God's Burning Fire (God's Burning Fire) Is In My… (is in My Heart God's Burning Fire Is In My Heart God's burning fire is in My heart God's burning fire is in My heart)

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I Love Jesus (I Love Jesus) With All My… (With All My Heart I Love Jesus With All My Heart) I Love a Jesus With All My Heart I Love Jesus With Allll my heart)

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Halleluiah! (Halleluiah!) We Praise… (We Praise Your Name Halleluiah! We Praise Your Name Halleluiah! We Praise Your Name Halleluiah! We Praise Your Name

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Jesus Has Come (Jesus Has Come) To Loook For… (To Look For Me Jesus Has Come Too Loook Foe Me, Jesus Has Come Too Looook For Me Jesus Has Come atooo Loook For Me)

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Oh Recieve Him (Oh Recieve Him) With Happi… (With Happiness Oh Recieve Him With Happiness Oh Recieve Him With Happiness Oh Recieve Him With Happiness)
